notes: Collapsed sidebar status bars. Each mini session tile in the collapsed rail now has a small status bar pinned to its bottom edge, so you can tell at a glance whether a session is waiting on you (yellow hazard stripes + "!", blinking), complete (rust + checkmark), working or starting (pulsing chrome dot), idle (dim dot), or exited (dark red + "x"). It reuses the same color and blink conventions as the expanded session tags, and the tile tooltip now includes the status label.
